claims.evidence: Lines 54-56: plain code block correctly preserved as ggplot(data = <DATA>, mapping = aes(<MAPPINGS>)) + <GEOM_FUNCTION>() — NOT translated, unlike the without-skill run

suggestions.reason: No assertion checks plain (non-R) code blocks. The without-skill French run incorrectly translated <DATA>→<DONNÉES>, <MAPPINGS>→<CORRESPONDANCES>, <GEOM_FUNCTION>()→<FONCTION_GEOM>(). This with-skill run correctly preserved them. Adding a 'plain-code-blocks-preserved' assertion would make this difference measurable.

eval_feedback.overall: All assertions pass. Skill correctly preserved the plain code block that the without-skill run failed on.
